prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.5 kg; Height 156.7 cm; BMI 33.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 9.0%; current 9.7%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 221mg/dL; 6 months ago 235mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 216mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.9kg; 9 months ago 82.3kg; 6 months ago 82.3kg; 3 months ago 80.3kg; current 81.5kg), Height (12 months ago 156.7cm; 9 months ago 156.7cm; 6 months ago 156.7cm; 3 months ago 156.7cm; current 156.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 73U/L; 9 months ago 77U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 78U/L), AST (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 53U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 62U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 87mg/g; 9 months ago 86mg/g; 6 months ago 126mg/g; 3 months ago 101mg/g; current 141mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 156mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
